---

- [ ] US1 — Add `graph workflow start` readiness checks and workflow recommendations: inspect graph state and advise whether to proceed, bootstrap, or clean up.
- [ ] US2 — Produce compact kickoff envelopes and delegation briefs: return bounded context and a prompt-ready sub-agent brief.
- [ ] US3 — Add `graph workflow finish` writeback and handoff envelopes: persist delegated outcomes and return revision-aware next-agent handoff output.

Full stories: `docs/themes/TH3-graph-backed-delegated-workflow/epics/E2-delegated-kickoff-and-handoff/stories/`
